document.name: workflow-builder-self-edit-livesync
document.title: Self-edit live-sync: edit workflow-builder UI → live on a per-run dev preview in seconds
document.summary: Provision a per-run ephemeral vite-dev Sandbox (devspace's image-replace model, cluster-native), clone workflow-builder, make a visible UI edit on the sign-in page, push src to that run's dev pod (vite HMR) via /__sync, verify the change is live, have a Playwright critic inspect it, then tear the preview down. P2 of the self-update loop (docs/agentic-deploy-inspect-loop.md). Set perRunPreview=false to target the shared standing workflow-builder-dev pod instead.

marker.title: Visible marker string
marker.description: Replaces the 'Workflow Builder' wordmark on the sign-in page; verified live.

perRunPreview.title: Provision a per-run dev preview Sandbox
perRunPreview.description: true = each run gets its own throwaway vite-dev Sandbox (torn down at the end); false = target the shared standing dev pod at devServiceUrl.

with.command:
${ "export REPOURL=" + ((.trigger.repoUrl // "PittampalliOrg/workflow-builder") | @sh) + ";" + "
set -e
cd /sandbox/work
rm -rf repo
git clone --depth 1 --single-branch https://x-access-token:${GITHUB_TOKEN}@github.com/$REPOURL.git repo
cd /sandbox/work/repo
git config user.email agent@workflow-builder.local
git config user.name "workflow-builder agent"
echo CLONED $(git rev-parse HEAD) on $(git rev-parse --abbrev-ref HEAD)" }

${ "export MARKER=" + ((.trigger.marker // "WFB live-sync OK") | @sh) + ";" + "
set -e
cd /sandbox/work/repo
F=src/routes/auth/sign-in/+page.svelte
sed -i "s|>Workflow Builder<|>$MARKER<|" "$F"
grep -qF "$MARKER" "$F" || { echo EDIT_FAILED; exit 1; }
echo EDITED "$F"; grep -n "$MARKER" "$F"" }

${ "export DEVURL=" + ((.provision_preview.url // .provision_preview.data.url // .trigger.devServiceUrl // "http://workflow-builder-dev.workflow-builder.svc.cluster.local:3000") | @sh) + ";" + "
set -e
cd /sandbox/work/repo
tar -czf /tmp/src.tgz src
# Direct pod-IP / Service-DNS HTTP — Dapr service invocation corrupts large
# binary bodies (2MB gzip -> 500); plain HTTP handles it. Unprivileged.
HTTP=$(curl -sS -o /tmp/sync.out -w "%{http_code}" -X POST --data-binary @/tmp/src.tgz -H "content-type: application/gzip" "$DEVURL/__sync")
echo "SYNC_HTTP=$HTTP"; cat /tmp/sync.out 2>/dev/null; echo
[ "$HTTP" = 200 ] || { echo SYNC_FAILED; exit 1; }
echo SYNCED" }

${ "export MARKER=" + ((.trigger.marker // "WFB live-sync OK") | @sh) + "; export DEVURL=" + ((.provision_preview.url // .provision_preview.data.url // .trigger.devServiceUrl // "http://workflow-builder-dev.workflow-builder.svc.cluster.local:3000") | @sh) + ";" + "
# Always exit 0: the marker verdict is judged from stdout (LIVE_OK) downstream,
# so the node output always registers for the summary even when not-live.
for i in $(seq 1 40); do
  if curl -sf "$DEVURL/auth/sign-in" | grep -qF "$MARKER"; then echo "LIVE_OK after ${i}s"; exit 0; fi
  sleep 2
done
echo NOT_LIVE; curl -s "$DEVURL/auth/sign-in" 2>/dev/null | head -c 800 || true; echo" }

agentConfig.name: Live-sync UI verifier
agentConfig.instructions: You are a UI verifier with EXACTLY ONE turn — do everything now and finish by WRITING the verdict file; do not wait for a follow-up. Steps in this single turn: (1) Using the Playwright MCP browser tools (server 'playwright'): browser_navigate to <devUrl>/auth/sign-in , then browser_take_screenshot with filename '/sandbox/work/critic-shot.png'. (2) Read the page (browser_snapshot) and decide whether it VISIBLY shows the exact marker text from the prompt (it replaced the 'Workflow Builder' wordmark on the sign-in page). (3) As your FINAL action, WRITE the file /sandbox/work/verdict-final.json with your file-write tool containing STRICT JSON and nothing else: {"markerPresent": <true|false>, "markerText": "<the marker>", "evidence": "<one sentence on what you saw>"}. The verdict-final.json file is the ONLY thing the workflow reads — writing it is mandatory. End with a one-line summary after the file is written.

body.prompt: ${ "Verify the live-sync change is rendered, then write the verdict file. Preview URL: " + (.provision_preview.url // .provision_preview.data.url // .trigger.devServiceUrl // "http://workflow-builder-dev.workflow-builder.svc.cluster.local:3000") + " . The sign-in page should now show the marker text: " + (.trigger.marker // "WFB live-sync OK") + " . Navigate, screenshot, and WRITE /sandbox/work/verdict-final.json per your instructions — all in this one turn." }

with.command: for i in $(seq 1 20); do [ -s /sandbox/work/verdict-final.json ] && break; sleep 1; done; if [ -s /sandbox/work/verdict-final.json ]; then cat /sandbox/work/verdict-final.json; else echo '{"markerPresent":false,"evidence":"verdict-final.json missing"}'; fi

set.uiMarkerPresent: ${ (((.read_verdict.result.stdout // .read_verdict.data.result.stdout // .read_verdict.stdout // "{}") | fromjson?) // {}) as $v | ($v.markerPresent // $v.marker_found // (((($v.verdict // $v.overall_verdict // "") | ascii_downcase) | test("pass")) and ($v.verdict != null or $v.overall_verdict != null)) // null) }
